name: skunkworks
description: Claude Code skills for moonrepo, utoipa, EventCatalog, and codebase analysis

plugins.name: moonrepo
plugins.description: moonrepo v2.1 expert -- workspace setup, task orchestration, CI/CD pipelines, Docker integration, remote caching, code generation, WASM plugin toolchains, MQL queries, and v1-to-v2 migration.

plugins.name: utoipa
plugins.description: Rust OpenAPI documentation with utoipa v5.4. Complete macro reference (ToSchema, OpenApi, IntoParams, IntoResponses), path attributes, security schemes, enum handling, validation, and integrations for Axum, Actix-web, Rocket.

plugins.name: eventcatalog
plugins.description: Document event-driven architectures with EventCatalog. Covers all 12 resource types, 184+ SDK functions, 15+ generator integrations, MCP server, visualizations, and schema support.

plugins.name: codebase-archaeology
plugins.description: Deep structural analysis of any codebase -- extracts business rules, maps data flows, traces dependencies, assesses risk, and produces transformation plans. Supports 7 analysis lenses.
